phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'uscita della stazione, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH loo-SHEE-tah del-la sta-TSYOH-neh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Straight, then stairs on the left.

responses.english: Straight, then stairs on the left.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva al porto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah al POR-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove inizia il sentiero Via dell'Amore, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOOzee DOveh eeNEEtsya eel senTYEHro VEEa delLAmoreh pehr faVOreh

likely_response.local: Inizia vicino al tunnel della stazione, a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: ee-nee-TSEE-ah vee-CHEE-noh AHL TOON-nehl DEHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh AH DEH-strah
likely_response.translation_en: It starts near the station tunnel, on the right.

responses.english: It starts near the station tunnel, on the right.
responses.phonetic: ee-nee-TSEE-ah vee-CHEE-noh AHL TOON-nehl DEHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh AH DEH-strah
responses.local: Inizia vicino al tunnel della stazione, a destra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si mangia il pesce fresco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see MAN-jah ee PEH-shay FRES-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the harbor, there are trattorias.

responses.english: At the harbor, there are trattorias.
